title: data.queue
description: The Stage's Promotions awaiting dispatch, in the order the gate considers them, so a policy can weigh the backlog against the candidate under evaluation (found by input.promotion.name). Not capped at the gate's evaluation limit.

origin.description: the promoted Freight's origin (e.g. Warehouse/<name>); absent when the Freight is unresolvable

notBefore.description: RFC 3339 earliest dispatch time, from the promote-after annotation; absent when unscheduled
